finding_results.notes: Reworked the Helga exchange from serial polished diagnoses into a scene with a treatment consequence. Helga now uses the six-week review to recommend the standard craving-management protocol (topiramate, daily group) — the same track used for entertainment-feed patients — creating a concrete misclassification with immediate stakes for Margot's care. Helga further reads Margot's insistence on differentiation as a resistance pattern, which means anything Margot says to contest the decision confirms the diagnosis. Margot's spoken friction is present at line 317 where she starts her practiced heartbeat description, catches herself repeating the polished version, and strips back to blunt frustration ('You're hearing addiction and filing it in the same fucking box'). The Tomas crash material is compressed from three separate formulations into one rough delivery at line 325. The 'Like furniture' metaphor is preserved at line 333 as private narrated thought rather than a performed diagnostic line to Helga. The Eisbach body-hunger evidence at lines 345 and 365 remains the chapter's primary embodied proof of craving, untouched.
Recast each cited descriptive-template site into local physical observation or scene-specific inventory so the chapter no longer leans on repeated inferential 'someone who' scaffolding.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt the chapter's last movement into an on-page Lausanne convergence, so Yusuf's publication now drives Lena's decision, Kai's participation, and the chapter's final collective state. Cleaned the repeated injury proofing and hedge diction, and corrected Margot's right-wrist continuity.

Revised the Helga therapy exchange to replace five serial composed diagnoses with a scene that changes Margot's treatment situation. Helga now recommends the standard entertainment-feed protocol based on a misclassification of Margot's addiction, and reads her objections as a resistance pattern — creating an impasse where contesting the treatment only confirms the clinical label. Margot's dialogue now includes spoken friction (a self-caught restart, casual profanity, flat resignation) rather than quotable insight. The Eisbach walk and surfer-watching passages remain untouched as the chapter's primary craving proof.
Removed the packet-cited recurring descriptive scaffold from all four targeted passages while preserving chapter structure, POV texture, and end-state continuity.
